mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TBL_COM_LINE
LINENM LIKE #{search}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_LINE ( LINECD, PAR_LINECD, FACTORYCD, LINENM, LINEDIV, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{LINECD}, #{PAR_LINECD}, #{FACTORYCD}, #{LINENM}, #{LINEDIV}, #{USEYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_LINE SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE LINECD = #{LINECD}
